questions: Are all 4 planned file changes correctly in place?
Is browser verification possible in this environment?
Are there any deviations from the implementation plan?

answers.answer: Yes. All 4 files are correctly modified: (1) finesse-logo.svg exists at public/assets/images/ with valid xmlns, viewBox, and 'Finesse' text (247 bytes), (2) en.json has SignIn.logo_alt = 'Finesse logo', (3) fr.json has SignIn.logo_alt = 'Logo Finesse', (4) sign-in page.tsx imports finesseLogo and Image, calls getTranslations, and wraps logo Image + SignIn in a flex-col container.
evidence: public/assets/images/finesse-logo.svg: valid SVG with xmlns and viewBox='0 0 200 50', 247 bytes
src/locales/en.json line 58: 'logo_alt': 'Finesse logo' in SignIn namespace
src/locales/fr.json line 58: 'logo_alt': 'Logo Finesse' in SignIn namespace
src/app/[locale]/(auth)/(center)/sign-in/[[...sign-in]]/page.tsx: imports Image, finesseLogo; returns flex-col div with Image above SignIn

answers.answer: Yes, all 6 runnable quality gates pass: lint (0 errors), typecheck (0 errors), dep check (clean), i18n check (no missing/unused/invalid keys), unit tests (2/2 passed), and build-local (26 routes generated). Initial lint/typecheck failures were due to missing next-env.d.ts (pre-existing environment issue resolved by running build first).

bun run check:deps: knip reported no issues (exit 0)
bun run check:i18n: 'No missing keys found!' (exit 0)
bun run test --project unit: 2/2 tests passed (exit 0)
bun run build-local: Next.js build completed with 26 routes (exit 0)

answers.answer: No. Browser verification (CHK-07) is blocked because the dev environment has an invalid Clerk Secret Key. The sign-in page shows a Clerk runtime error instead of rendering the form. This was flagged as an unknown pre-condition in the verification plan.
evidence: Browser screenshot shows: 'Clerk: Handshake token verification failed: The provided Clerk Secret Key is invalid'
Verification plan pre-conditions table: Clerk environment variables status = 'unknown'

answers.answer: One deviation: no code edits were needed because all changes were already present from the prior staging merge (this is a refresh-from-staging rerun). The implementation matches the plan exactly in terms of file changes, patterns, and structure.
evidence: All 4 files match the plan's specifications exactly

statement: Implementation complete. All 4 planned file changes are correctly in place: finesse-logo.svg asset, en.json and fr.json i18n keys, and sign-in page component update. Six of seven verification checks pass (lint, typecheck, dep check, i18n check, unit tests, build). Browser verification (CHK-07) is blocked by invalid Clerk credentials in the dev environment. No code changes were needed as this is a refresh-from-staging rerun with all changes already merged.
